repos.name: yjs
repos.description: CRDT-based shared data types for real-time collaborative editing in web applications.
repos.risk_notes: Primarily client-side library; network usage depends on chosen provider (WebRTC, WebSocket). No inherent server-side exec.
repos.alignment_notes: Fits real-time collaborative dashboard editing with minimal backend changes.

repos.name: langchainjs
repos.description: JavaScript/TypeScript library for building LLM-powered applications.
repos.risk_notes: Relies on external LLM providers; network calls to third-party APIs; risk of data leakage if prompts contain sensitive data.
repos.alignment_notes: Could power insight summaries or natural language queries in dashboards; supports provider-agnostic setups.

repos.name: opentelemetry-js
repos.description: OpenTelemetry instrumentation for Node.js and browser.
repos.risk_notes: Introduces network exports to collectors; can add performance overhead if misconfigured.
repos.alignment_notes: Enables standardized tracing/metrics for Next.js SSR and Node backend services.

repos.name: playwright
repos.description: Fast and reliable end-to-end testing for modern web apps.
repos.risk_notes: Downloads browser binaries; ensure CI sandboxing and cache management.
repos.alignment_notes: Improves E2E test coverage for auth flows, sharing, and filter operations; integrates with GitHub Actions.

repos.name: trivy
repos.description: Comprehensive container and filesystem vulnerability scanner.
repos.risk_notes: Reads images and files for CVE detection; does not execute target code; requires handling of findings and SBOM generation.
repos.alignment_notes: Adds CI gate for container image vulnerability scanning before release.
